programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka learns that her father's former business partner deals in a highly addictive drug called Flash. The rest of the crew holds a "garage sale" to earn money for new ship parts.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda discovers her "sister ship", the Pax Magellanic. The crew aboard Pax is 300 years old, but have not aged a day

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Gerentex is back and demands Trance and Harper help him with his new scheme: finding Tarn-Vedra.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka takes the Andromeda to Tarn-Vedra, but extended time in the slipstream causes side effects. To combat them, Beka starts taking Flash and soon becomes addicted.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and James Braxton, in a bright red classic Alfa Romeo, visit some of the county's finest antique shops. They explore a cold war submarine and discover how Pocahontas came to Kent, before arriving at an auction in West Sussex.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross, James Braxton and their little Red Alfa, called Nelly, take in some of the finest Roman mosaics in Britain and discover the story of an Arts and Crafts masterpiece, before whizzing towards a Wokingham auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Charlie Ross are shopping from Buckinghamshire to the Cotswolds. Charlie buys something he calls "ghastly," and James makes a purchase purely on his sense of smell. Will these strange strategies pay off at the auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and James Braxton visit shops in Somerset, Devon and Dorset and enjoy a quick dip in the 'English Riviera.' For the final, James has invested in the power of cute, while Charlie sticks to what he knows best -- brown furniture.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw hears about a WWI hero who continued to spend a fortune on collectibles while under fire. Margie Cooper heads to Whitby to find out about local sailors who went to sea in birds' nests.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw blows a massive horn while Margie Cooper goes bananas in a hothouse at Chatsworth House. Paul gets excited about bus conductors while Margie sweetens the deal with a very peculiar honey separator.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Mark Hill hears the remarkable story of Joseph Briggs, an Accrington engraver who emigrated to America to work for Tiffany; Fiona Bruce examines a collection of cut-throat razors; a "Lone Ranger" fanatic shares his vast collection.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Finds include a Rolex, a ring by one of the world's great jewelers and an old train ticket.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team visit the Liverpool Metropolitan Cathedral, where treasures include a miniature kitchen range, a piece of the city's heritage found in a French flea market and a sextant used at sea in the race to rescue survivors of the Titanic.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Donna has extreme hatred for her daughter-in-law, Jen, and it's coming between her relationship with her son, Brad. Jen & Brad say they're so terrified of Donna, they changed the locks and sleep with a gun. Can Dr. Phil calm these feuding in-laws?

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When Jenaye posted an emotional video online about uncovering her husband James's infidelity she never imagined it would go viral. Discovering James slept with his hairstylist on their fifth anniversary, Jenaye says divorce might be the best option.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Cindy tells her own alcohol history. Sarah emerges from her addiction haze. Dr. Phil reunites the twins with Perry, their father. Leaving The Dr. Phil House, a stop at the studios and a goodbye to Dr. Phil, the twins head to separate rehab centers. Part 3

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Do you have a relative scheming to get money from a rich aunt, uncle or even parents when they pass away?

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Nancy, who adamantly denies her online love relationship with "Shaun" is a scam. Nancy and her son Darcy speak face-to-face for the first time in over a year. Plus updates from past catfished guests!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Are you a 'social media lurker?' How often do you scroll through social media platforms to stare at other people's photos and videos and decide that person is surely living their best life, and you are not. A deep dive into posting: real vs fake.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Binge drinking has increasingly become a way of life and death on college campuses. Dr. Phil talks to two 20-somethings who admit to binge drinking regularly, but say they are not alcoholics. Will one family's painful loss convince these two to sober up?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brooklyn, 18, says she is tired of her mom butting into her love life with boyfriend Eric. Mom Courtney says it's because Brooklyn's boyfriend has two children & a wife! Eric's wife, Mandy, wants Brooklyn to leave her husband alone & she'll fight for him.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Monet Monico, 19, was fast becoming an acting & singing sensation, but just 2 years later, her family says the Hollywood hopeful has become a homeless heroin addict. Facing her family for the first time in 6 months, will Monet accept help?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Trust has been ranked as the #1 crucial quality for a happy marriage. Deanne & Brian have been married for 12 years with four children between them. Now, due to alleged lies and infidelity, their family is torn apart and divorce is just a signature away.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A New Year can bring a new and improved you. Dr. Phil's guests say it's their loved ones who are the ones who need changing. It's been 10 years since Marcia has been on a date, and her daughter says it's time for her mom to get back in the game.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: At 700 lbs., Pauline, 48, has a Guinness World Record title of Heaviest Living Woman. Pauline is also a mother, daughter & friend with hopes and dreams of a better life for herself & her 18-year-old son Dillon. Can Dr. Phil help get her life on track?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.desc: The Clampetts get a big food package from home and Mr. Drysdale's two associates, Mr. Lucus and Mr. Pendleton think that the crawdads have something to do with the development of military reconnaissance technology.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed sends Elly to the Beverly Hills dress boutique he used to own (now the House of Maurice) to learn how to be a lady, where Mrs. Drysdale mistakes her for royalty.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale wants Jed to incorporate for the tax advantages. So the Clampetts take over the top floor of the Commerce Bank and start doing what they can to stimulate the economy by getting more money into the hands of more people.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's driving and Ellie's cooking makes a policeman and a cab driver think that the Clampett Mansion is a mental institution.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale hires a demolition man to remove the Clampett's cabin. Mr. Drysdale decides to occupy the cabin so it can't be removed. The Clampetts think a "homewrecker" is breaking up the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro's running late for his graduation ceremony despite his new watch. Mrs. Potts of Jethro's school is afraid that his attendance will jeopardize her chances for a new endowment. Cousin Bessie saves the day.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale buys Mammoth Pictures, a movie studio. Jed, Granny, Elly and Jethro try to "help" the studio, which is losing money, by working at the studio.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to run the store on the empty studio Western set but can't understand why they don't have any customers.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed gets an honorary doctorate when he donates money to the college that Mr. Drysdale attended. Now the family thinks he can now practice medicine, which doesn't sit well with Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she can get the hillbillies to move out by throwing herself at Jed. Meanwhile Granny is itching to fight her because she fell into the cement pond when Jed had to stop a fight between them earlier.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.desc: TV personality Caroline Manzo ("The Real Housewives of New Jersey") wants Patti to set up her two sons, Albie and Chris.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Detective Camille's friend dies on a party boat, leaving her and Detective Poole to solve the case, and find who murdered her.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Wheelchair-bound June Anderson is strangled in the villa she is renting with husband Doug and sister Janice; though Janice is her beneficiary and has no alibi, Poole suspects Doug, a former colleague whom he knows to be corrupt and an alcoholic.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A hurricane approaches Saint-Marie as the police team strives to solve the murder of a young meteorologist staged to look like it was caused by a natural disaster.

programme.title: Death in Paradise

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: Great Slaughter plays host to the summer roadshow of kids' TV show "Jolly Roger," much to the annoyance of editor Dinah Morgan; Dinah is soon discovered smothered on set during a live show; Sister Boniface is called to investigate.

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: A sighting of the mysteriously missing Baron Battenberg sends the press and police into a frenzy; determined to uncover the facts, Ruth and Sam go undercover at the Pranayama retreat, run by the Baron's widow Marion Grey and brother Edwin Battenberg.

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: Peggy is delighted when old school friend and supermodel Robin returns home to film a documentary; all goes awry as Max Savage, Robin's manager, is found dead in his bedroom.

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: Sister Boniface and the gang are horrified to discover the hallmarks of a ritualistic human sacrifice in the woods, supposedly acted out by a coven of witches.

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: Convinced that events catastrophic to the Cold War are being planned at the British Open Chess Championships, Sister Boniface must brush off her chess skills and join the tournament.

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: Felix is Police Advisor on set of the latest "Oh! Do Behave!" picture; Felix is soon called to action once the abrasive director Sexton St Juste is found strangled.

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS tiene que desentrañar la verdad sobre el asesinato de un guardia de prisión, que provocó un motín y dejó a McGee en manos de los reclusos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Se revelan secretos del pasado de Ducky cuando aparece apuñalado en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Todo depende del cristal
programme.desc: Frank se enfrenta a una periodista que se niega a revelar su fuente, aunque admite haber cometido un asesinato. Danny se empareja con un adolescente problemático en un programa de la policía para ayudarlo a tomar mejores decisiones.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Revancha
programme.desc: Un sospechoso admite haber matado a un chef de un programa de reality show en su restaurante. Danny y Maria creen que está asumiendo la culpa por alguien. Frank enfrenta un dilema moral con su amigo, el senador Ted McCreary.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Nuevas reglas
programme.desc: Cuando alguien cercano a Frank es asesinado, Frank ordena que todos se involucren para atrapar al asesino. Danny y Maria visitan a Mario Hunt, un conocido miembro de una pandilla peligrosa, para trabajar en el caso.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El arte de la guerra
programme.desc: Cuando un miembro de la familia Reagan es tiroteado, Danny intenta rastrear al miembro de la pandilla responsable sin dejar que sus emociones lo dominen. También debe ser creativo para atraer a testigos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se llama al UAC a Salt Lake City, Utah, para investigar un triple asesinato, la búsqueda de una conexión entre las víctimas podría llevarlos hasta un fugitivo que podría estar relacionado con el sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Al encontrar cadáveres congelados flotando en el lago en Nevada, la investigación de UAC los lleva a sospechar que las víctimas formaban parte de una secta que podría estar detrás de las muertes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC está buscando a un asesino serial en Tallahasseeen, que llama a las autoridades para informar de los crímenes antes de cometer un asesinato.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC regresa a sus orígenes cuando miran uno de los viejos casos de Rossi y Gideon para localizar a un asesino que se escapó.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Se revelan secretos del pasado de Ducky cuando aparece apuñalado en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el extraño asesinato de un capitán de la Marina, sospechando que su vida privada turbulenta podría ser la razón de su muerte.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS se ve envuelto en una banda de la ciudad mientras investiga la muerte de un Marine, y Gibbs debe enfrentar su pasado una vez más al encontrar un mensaje en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando uno de los antiguos casos de Tony se reabre, él intercambia roles con Gibbs para finalmente resolver el crimen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers detect a strong odor of marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A woman tells officers her inebriated boyfriend smashed a window. Police investigate a suspicious vehicle parked behind a cemetery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer finds a woman asleep at the wheel in the middle of a highway, deputies investigate a possible kidnapping, and a nervous driver just wants to be honest with police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police have a breakthrough in a burglary case, a man found with drugs in his pants claims the pants are not his, and officers deal with a familiar domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect in possession of a stolen truck leads everyone on a chase through some bumpy terrain. Gas station employees call police when they spot a couple asleep at the pump. A man familiar to deputies shows them he can change.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Spike strips are used to end a pursuit, but not before a woman falls out. A passenger flees from a stop and changes clothes. A woman from Oklahoma driving a windowless car admits to using meth.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is captured after appearing on an episode of "America's Most Wanted". An Officer detains a man for drug possession. Officers serve a search warrant and find four suspects with narcotics in their home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with a knife resists as a hotel clerk cheers on Officers. A man protests the legality of a stop but finally admits why he argued with Officers. A passenger becomes emotional when meth is found.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcycle with no license plate crashes while fleeing from Deputies. A woman driving a car with no windshield blames her ex-boyfriend. A gun is found hidden in a seat during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sizable amount of cocaine is seized during a routine search. An officer responds to a domestic dispute call, in which there are conflicting stories at the scene. An officer’s patrol car is nearly struck by a train, twice.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers search for suspects stealing rims at a car dealership. A married couple claim drugs found in their car were from a nearby ditch. Officers detain an inebriated man arguing with a store clerk.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a man who attempted to cash a bad check then fled the scene. Police are called when a man’s ex-girlfriend breaks into his house. Police chase an unlicensed teen speeding in a vehicle

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After deputies pursue a car-theft suspect to his home, he tries to convince them he has been there all along, and a man violates a protection order to try to reconcile with his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Emotions run high when a dispute between siblings gets out of hand, a man struggles to keep his story straight with the police, and deputies investigate a domestic incident.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a fleeing vehicle through backyards, officers follow the trail of a suicidal man who may be armed, and a family argument over chips and dip leads to violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young man receives a wake-up call when police catch him breaking the law, and officers play peacemakers after a board game sparks a family feud.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A first-time offender brings officers on an intense car chase, deputies respond to an armed robbery, and a routine traffic stop ends in multiple arrests.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Missouri police recover a stolen vehicle, a scuffle between two women at a bar escalates to biting, and a concerned neighbor places a possible domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An inebriated man is arrested after getting caught peering through the window of a recovery center. After a foot chase officers bring down a well-known local felon. Police respond to a domestic dispute at a local mobile home park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy calls for backup when he's outnumbered, a former Marine damages his neighbors' property, and a husband and wife are separated after their vehicle is searched.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets busted during a drug deal, a cyclist gets confused when an officer finds narcotics in his pants, and officers respond to reports of gunfire.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are dumbfounded when a man tries to talk them into taking him to jail. Sparks fly when a driver tries to take his truck on the freeway with only two wheels. Deputies are on guard when they approach a belligerent man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An alleged lawbreaker can't seem to grasp the gravity of her situation, and officers question a colorful trio of suspects.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A son fights his mom and responding officers, a man tells police the wad of weed in his mouth is not his, and a pack of cigarillos is the root of a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Recovery of a stolen vehicle uncovers a weapon and a lengthy criminal history. Detectives cross paths with a car that was stolen in a carjacking. Officers speak with a man who has questionable standards regarding gun safety.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female victim tells the officers that two men kicked in her front door. Three suspects attempt to steal a bicycle in an alley. Following routine questioning of a petrified wife, officer arrests the husband for domestic abuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Security guards face wild threats from a suspect who states he has a 'burner' gun. A man is bit on the head and nearly faints. A passenger throws out a suspicious bag during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects hit a car with their U-Haul truck. A suspect flees on foot after a car pursuit. An elderly man is selling fake jewelry.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team rallies around one of their own, who is shot in the line of duty and may not survive on the sixth season finale.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While Grissom leads a group of college students on a tour of CSI, the dead speak while the CSIs investigate, each narrating their own case

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate first-hand the behind-the-scenes action of Cirque du Soleil in order to determine what may have contributed to a young dancer's untimely death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is fascinated when every detail of a miniature is identical to that of a real crime scene, and he goes about trying to solve the case using the clues provided.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When an innocent man is brutally attacked and beaten to death by what looks like a monster in a black cape, the CSIs are called to investigate, only to learn that a similar attack took place minutes later.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a dead woman is found hanging from a cross inside a church, the team follows the evidence to uncover a bizarre love triangle dating all the way back to the victim's high school days.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When two young boys are reported missing, a known neighborhood sex offender is the primary suspect.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While investigating an elderly woman's murder, Grissom receives a miniature crime scene replica; Greg attends a hearing to ascertain his culpability in a teenager's accidental death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When identical twins are found dead, the evidence in both cases does not immediately prove a connection between the two deaths. However, as the CSIs dig deeper into the histories of the women, a surprising twist takes the investigation in a new direction.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a string of murders in Las Vegas that may be tied to an infamous mob boss from the 1970s who disappeared many years ago.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs process clues after a murder at a poultry manufacturing plant, the evidence leads them to the home of a man who collects miniature trains and other miniature paraphernalia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine's testimony in court is not enough to convict a killer suspected of murdering his own mother. Adam Novak, with whom Catherine had a brief romantic encounter, is the lawyer who represents the killer and secures his freedom.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The lead suspect for the high-profile murder of anti-drug crusading assemblyman Danilo Zamesca is Thomas Simon, the west coast's biggest drug supplier.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: As Catherine and Keppler begin to investigate the murder of a teen-aged Jane Doe, both agree that the killer, who was meticulous in removing evidence from the body and its surrounding area, is likely a repeat offender.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se despide de Catherine Willows mientras toma una decisión que cambiará su vida.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer es encontrada muerta y su cabello arreglado al estilo de los años 70 y ropa vintage, el equipo de CSI descubre pistas que apuntan a un asesino con un fetiche por el cabello.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Russell pide consejo a una antigua colega sobre un caso relacionado con la muerte de la exnovia de un hombre. Elisabeth Shue se une al elenco como la nueva CSI Julie Finlay.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Cuando una casa es totalmente robada de sus cimientos, el equipo de CSI busca respuestas. Mientras tanto, la nueva CSI Julie Finlay muestra su habilidad en el análisis de sangre.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Cuando un apagón paraliza la ciudad, el equipo de CSI debe volver a los métodos de la vieja escuela para resolver el caso de un niño desaparecido.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado para resolver el caso de un estudiante asesinado recientemente de quien la foto de su muerte termina siendo tendencia en internet.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Cuando se llama al equipo de CSI para investigar un robo y homicidio en una boda con el tema de “Alicia en el país de las maravillas”, no tienen mucho con qué trabajar para hallar al asesino. (Estrella invitada Jaclyn Smith)

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Cuando se llama al equipo de CSI para investigar a un hombre a quien le disparan a quemarropa en un casino local, cerraron todo el edificio en busca del asesino.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Cuando Stokes se entera de que se anulará la condena de un hombre al que ayudó a encarcelar, el equipo de CSI debe probar nuevamente que el asesino es culpable o será liberado.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Cuando una bomba mata a un conductor de camión de carreras todoterreno en mitad de la carrera, se llama al equipo de CSI a la escena para investigar por qué.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga tres cadáveres a pocas cuadras de una cena de campaña, ellos creen saber quién es el asesino antes de hacer un descubrimiento impactante.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: La nieta de DB Russell fue secuestrada al final de la temporada 12 y ahora él dirige al equipo de CSI en una búsqueda para encontrarla, en el estreno de la temporada 13.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI llega a su restaurante favorito solo para descubrir una espantosa escena del crimen con ocho víctimas muertas y muchas preguntas.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Cuando una joven es asesinada a tiros en una gran rave en el desierto, el equipo de CSI tiene que buscar pistas, encontrar a su amiga desaparecida y llevar al asesino ante la justicia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A high-stakes poker game is disrupted by a masked assassin, leaving one player dead and the CSIs baffled.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio finds another corpse with missing eyes, everything points to his nemesis, The Taunter – except he has an airtight alibi.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when three convicted murderers are released from prison and someone starts killing them one by one.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When an entire family disappears into thin air, Horatio vows to find them, dead or alive.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs expose the seedy underbelly of children’s beauty pageants when a contestant's mom is murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An eccentric genius is assassinated with the most unique weapon the CSIs have ever seen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a skydiver is murdered, the CSIs discover that he has more than 100 children and all of them are suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the sisters of a Miami sorority are knocked off one by one, the CSIs try to end the murder spree.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a neighborhood do-gooder is murdered, Horatio and the CSIs discover that he was planning to blow the whistle on something big.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the Miami Taunter kills again, Horatio comes face-to-face with the matriarch of the suspected killer's family, who may or may not help his investigation.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a beloved tennis coach is nearly killed, Calleigh discovers a personal connection to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio uncovers a corruption scandal that pits him against an old adversary, and Calleigh makes a life-changing decision.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When one of the CSI's biggest enemies is murdered, Horatio must determine which of his team members is a suspect.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Megan Donner returns to the CSI unit in time to work on a jet crash in the Everglades. They discover a victim five miles from the crash.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Encuentran estrangulada a una actriz de cine para adultos en el parque y llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar y encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Una peligrosa investigación lleva al equipo de CSI por un camino traicionero que conducirá a la trágica pérdida de uno de los suyos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: La vida de Yelina está en peligro cuando Horatio y el equipo de CSI trabajan en un caso para condenar a un rapero sospechoso de un tiroteo al estilo de Miami desde un auto en movimiento.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un flash mob surge en un campo de golf privado, ¿el grupo de estudiantes estaba allí para esconder un cuerpo o para dejar uno?

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Empujan a una mujer frente a un tren en movimiento del metro de Miami y tanto su novio como la exnovia acosadora son sospechosos de su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El ambiente de discoteca de Miami se vuelve mortal cuando el consumo de alcohol por parte de menores provoca un sangriento asesinato en un baño, Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un viaje de campo del jurado a la escena de un asesinato provoca un vuelco legal cuando el acusado termina muerto y los doce miembros del jurado se convierten en los principales sospechosos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Una noche de citas rápidas para los solteros de Miami se vuelve mortal para un machote de South Beach que está en el extremo equivocado del carro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Miami Beach es evacuada debido a un tsunami, pero el equipo de CSI permanece después de descubrir un complot de robo a un banco mientras investiga un asesinato aparentemente aleatorio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Una serie de cadáveres, encontrados frente a la costa de Miami, resulta ser obra de piratas modernos. Horatio y el equipo investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un hombre inocente muere cuando alguien cae sobre él desde un balcón. El equipo de CSI se encuentra en el centro de un escándalo de sexo y un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un robo de auto aparentemente al azar resulta ser lo contrario cuando la adicción al juego de una mujer joven se vuelve más de lo que la empresa familiar puede soportar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: La investigación de un tiroteo en la sala de emergencias de un hospital coloca al equipo de CSI en medio de un caso de asesinato que involucra al líder de una pandilla callejera importante.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A very powerful woman in the world of politics is found dead leaving many desperate in hoping that her information does not get leaked out.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the death of a young archaeologist who may have unearthed the answer to one of New York City's oldest murder mysteries.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When three defendants are gunned down on the eve of their trial, Mac is forced to make good on a promise he made to a reluctant witness.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Investigation of a floating crime scene leads the team into the world of SecretU an art-house world of true confessionals.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When two men who share the same name as detective Mac Taylor are killed, detective Taylor rounds up all the other Mac Taylors in New York and tries to figure out who will be the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The remains of a pregnant 17-year-old are found in the trunk of a crashed car, but the baby is missing. During the investigation, Danny finds out some shocking news about Lindsay.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs are forced to investigate two crimes at once with a mysterious energy field near The Empire State Building at the center of both.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs appear to have an open and shut case after a murder suspect is impaled during a police pursuit, but it turns out to only be beginning.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Young brides-to-be fight over a killer dress at the biggest wedding gown sale of the year and one of the shoppers winds up dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs must piece together a human jigsaw puzzle when a beloved wrestling coach's severed body parts are found buried throughout the city.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A Russian tourist is found stabbed to death and the CSIs come face to face with the frightening realities of human trafficking.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the Mayor's dead body falls from the ceiling at a charity fundraiser, Stella and her date find themselves in the middle of the crime scene.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a buzzard flying over Manhattan drops a human eyeball from its claw, the race is on to find the body it belongs to.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A lethal pipe bomb blows a Manhattan townhouse and valuable evidence to pieces, forcing the CSIs to get creative in reconstructing evidence.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Fiesta bajo el agua (S7 Ep13)
programme.desc: Cuando un camión articulado que lleva invitados a una fiesta termina misteriosamente en el fondo del río Hudson, el equipo de CSI debe exhumar los restos empapados.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Criminal con estilo (S7 Ep14)
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI rastrea a un asesino a sueldo afable y encantador, su investigación descubre una conspiración de consecuencias de gran alcance.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Justiciera (S7 Ep15)
programme.desc: Cuando un violador en serie es asesinado e inmovilizado de la misma manera que sus víctimas, el equipo de CSI sopesa el sentido de la justicia frente a su sentido del deber.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: El intocable (S7 Ep16)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a una mujer obsesionada con conspiraciones, el equipo de CSI investiga y descubre que algunas de sus teorías pueden haber tenido algo de verdad.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Hacer o morir (S7 Ep17)
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un alumno popular en la escuela privada más elitista de Manhattan, el equipo de CSI se encuentra en el competitivo mundo de los más privilegiados.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Crisis de identidad (S7 Ep18)
programme.desc: Jo equilibra los desafíos personales y profesionales cuando su hija adoptiva, Ellie, es la testigo clave en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Comida con sentimiento (S7 Ep19)
programme.desc: El equipo entra en el competitivo mundo de los camiones de comida gourmet cuando uno explota en un festival de comida de SoHo mientras Hawkes está ahí con su novia.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Nada a cambio (S7 Ep20)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de una mujer como obra de un asesino en serie. Mac vuelve a ponerse en contacto con su primer compañero después de que un ex convicto empieza a acosarlo.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Cadena perpetua (S7 Ep21)
programme.desc: Después de que una lluvia de disparos cruza el laboratorio de criminalística, Mac y su excompañero se convierten en parte de una venganza que lleva 17 años.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Estrategia de salida (S7 Ep22)
programme.desc: Después de una experiencia cercana a la muerte, el detective Mac Taylor está bastante decidido a cerrar su último caso sin resolver.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Imborrable (S8 Ep1)
programme.desc: En el décimo aniversario del 11 de setiembre, Mac y el equipo recuerdan momentos específicos de ese día que les quedaron grabados de forma indeleble en la mente.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Hazlo realidad (S8 Ep2)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerto a un adolescente torpe, el equipo descubre que sus esfuerzos por conquistar el corazón de una atractiva roquera punk pueden haber ido demasiado lejos.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: El caballero andante (S8 Ep3)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran el cuerpo de una hermosa joven en una Ferrari robada, la investigación conduce a una familia de ladrones de autos.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Oficial involucrado (S8 Ep4)
programme.desc: Una salida nocturna amistosa para tomar un trago sufre un cambio inesperado cuando Danny y sus policías novatos se ven envueltos en un tiroteo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Cómo perder a un hombre en 10 días.

programme.title: Amigos con derechos

programme.title: El diario de Bridget Jones
programme.desc: La soltera Bridget Jones decide cambiar su vida y escribir sus pensamientos, opiniones e inseguridades en un diario. El resultado es una divertida crónica de sus aventuras en este clásico de la modernidad romántica.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Al borde de la razón
programme.desc: Después de seis semanas perfectas con su novio Mark Darcy, el pícaro Daniel Cleaver vuelve, afirmando ser un hombre reformado. ¿Encontrará Bridget una forma de hacer que el amor perdure para siempre?

programme.title: El bebé de Bridget Jones
programme.desc: Regresa Bridget Jones inesperadamente embarazada y sin saber la identidad del padre del bebé. Los ganadores del Óscar Renée Zellweger y Colin Firth se unen a Patrick Dempsey en el siguiente capítulo de la vida divertida y sorpresiva de Bridget.

programme.title: Sirenas
programme.desc: Una joven se ve atrapada en una guerra emocional, al lidiar con su primer amor y una madre poco convencional.

programme.title: El diario de Bridget Jones
programme.desc: La soltera Bridget Jones decide cambiar su vida y escribir sus pensamientos, opiniones e inseguridades en un diario. El resultado es una divertida crónica de sus aventuras en este clásico de la modernidad romántica.

programme.title: El vuelo
programme.desc: Un piloto logra evitar que un vuelo se estrelle, pero la investigación del fallo revela algo inquietante.

programme.title: Renegados
programme.desc: En la Cuba de 1898, cinco Buffalo Soldiers encuentran un alijo de oro, desertan y regresan a Estados Unidos, donde ayudan a defender un pueblo afroamericano del KKK, mientras intentan evitar ser capturados por las autoridades civiles y militares.

programme.title: Lila & Eve
programme.desc: Dos madres angustiadas, cuyos hijos murieron por disparos en un automóvil en movimiento, se unen para vengar sus muertes después de que las autoridades locales no tomen medidas.

programme.title: La duda
programme.desc: Este cautivador drama lleno de suspenso elevado por las actuaciones de los nominados al Óscar Meryl Streep, Philip Seymour Hoffman, Amy Adams y Viola Davis, Doubt, te mantendrá en vilo.

programme.title: The Words (en Español)
programme.desc: Bradley Cooper, Dennis Quaid, Olivia Wilde y Jeremy Irons encabezan este thriller romántico sobre un autor que debe enfrentarse a la realidad de la ficción en una historia que nos mantendrá expectantes hasta el final.

programme.title: La fuerza de la verdad
programme.desc: Henry es un abogado exitoso que necesita ganar a toda costa, incluso si debe sacrificar a su familia. Pero un disparo detiene el veloz ascenso de Henry, dejándolo incapacitado y sin recuerdos de su vida anterior.

programme.title: Rocketman (ESP)
programme.desc: Esta película biográfica musical única emprende el espectacular viaje de Elton John a la fama.

programme.title: La estafa maestra
programme.desc: Tras ser traicionados y abandonados a su suerte en Italia, Charlie Croker y su equipo planean un elaborado robo de oro contra su antiguo aliado.

programme.title: Aguas profundas
programme.desc: Kate (Halle Berry) acepta la lucrativa oportunidad de guiar a un empresario millonario en busca de emociones, por medio del buceo con tiburones en las más peligrosas aguas... fuera de la jaula.

programme.title: Justa venganza
programme.desc: Después de que su esposa es brutalmente asesinada, el exmafioso Ben Archer libra la guerra contra las tríadas chinas. Protagonizada por la leyenda de acción Jean-Claude Van Damme.

programme.title: Perdido en la fama
programme.desc: Un rockero semi retirado y caprichoso (Antonio Banderas) debe espabilarse para rescatar a su esposa, quien ha sido secuestrada mientras se encontraba de vacaciones en Chile.

programme.title: Rambo: Primera Sangre
programme.desc: El veterano de la guerra de Vietnam, John J. Rambo, vaga a una pequeña ciudad de Washington en busca de su viejo amigo, pero se encuentra con la intolerancia y brutalidad del aguacil, Will Teasle.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Rambo se rehúsa a unirse a su amigo y antiguo mentor, el coronel Trautman en una misión en Afganistán. La misión falla y Trautman es capturado por tropas rusas. Ahora Rambo debe infiltrarse a la fortaleza rusa y salvar a su único amigo.

programme.title: Rambo II: la misión
programme.desc: John Rambo is enviado a una misión al sureste de Asia para rastrear a unos prisioneros de guerra, pero termina enfrentando a soldados vietnamitas que resguardan los campos.

programme.title: Ben-Hur (2016)
programme.desc: La novela épica de redención de Lew Wallace vuelve con esta conmovedora adaptación en la que un noble inculpado (Jack Huston) sobrevive a años de esclavitud para vengarse del amigo (Toby Kebbell) que lo traicionó. Coprotagonizada por Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Bumblebee (ESP)
programme.desc: Bumblebee, un robot herido y destrozado, es encontrado y reparado por una adolescente llamada Charlie. Ambos deberán unir fuerzas para salvar el planeta de los malvados Decepticons en esta aventura llena de acción para toda la familia.

programme.title: Ben-Hur (2016)
programme.desc: La novela épica de redención de Lew Wallace vuelve con esta conmovedora adaptación en la que un noble inculpado (Jack Huston) sobrevive a años de esclavitud para vengarse del amigo (Toby Kebbell) que lo traicionó. Coprotagonizada por Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Sherlock Gnomes (ESP)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a una aventura fe-gnome-nal en el mundo secreto de los gnomos de jardín! Cuando Gnomeo y Julieta descubren que sus amigos han desaparecido, junto al detective SHERLOCK GNOMES, resuelven el misterio y traen a los gnomos a casa.

programme.title: Jimmy Neutrón: El niño genio
programme.desc: Durante la noche, los extraterrestres llegan a la tierra en sus naves espaciales y secuestran a todos los padres del pueblo de Jimmy, Retroville. Jimmy debe rescatar a los padres secuestrados.

programme.title: Dora y la ciudad perdida
programme.desc: Cuando sus padres desaparecen en busca de la Ciudad Perdida del Oro, Dora se lanza a una trepidante aventura para encontrarlos. Acompaña a Dora y a sus amigos mientras se adentran en la selva, se adelantan a los cazatesoros y desvelan el misterio.

programme.title: Bumblebee (ESP)
programme.desc: Bumblebee, un robot herido y destrozado, es encontrado y reparado por una adolescente llamada Charlie. Ambos deberán unir fuerzas para salvar el planeta de los malvados Decepticons en esta aventura llena de acción para toda la familia.

programme.title: Un detective suelto en Hollywood II
programme.desc: Axel Foley regresa a Beverly Hills para ayudar a Taggart y Rosewood a investigar el tiroteo casi mortal del jefe Bogomil y la serie de "crímenes del alfabeto" asociados a él. Protagonizada por Eddie Murphy.

programme.title: Un detective suelto en Hollywood III
programme.desc: Axel Foley (Eddie Murphy), que investiga una red de robo de coches, se encuentra con algo mucho más grande que eso: los mismos hombres que mataron a su jefe llevan una red de blanqueo de dinero en un parque temático de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Bandidos
programme.desc: ¡Prepárate para una comedia de acción de lo más divertida con Bruce Willis, Billy Bob Thornton y Cate Blanchett! Joe (Willis) y Terry (Thornton), dos convictos, arman un plan para robar un banco… hasta que se topan con una ama de casa bastante excéntrica.

programme.title: Los locos efectos del divorcio
programme.desc: Un adulto atrapado en el fuego cruzado de los 15 años de divorcio de sus padres descubre que formó parte de un estudio sobre niños divorciados y es reclutado para un seguimiento años después, lo que provoca nuevos estragos en su familia.

programme.title: El periodista, la leyenda de Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: En el mundo de los noticieros de los setenta, Ron Burgundy y su equipo son los líderes en San Diego. Todo marcha muy bien para los chicos hasta que la reportera estrella, Veronica Corningstone, llega para cambiar las cosas

programme.title: Jugando con fuego
programme.desc: Cuando el bombero Jake Carson (John Cena) y su equipo (Keegan-Michael Key y John Leguizamo) rescatan a tres hermanos que se encontraban en la trayectoria de un incendio forestal.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el policía?
programme.desc: Leslie Nielsen es Frank Drebin, el policía más "despistado" de las pelis, quien tendrá que detener un plan macabro para asesinar a la reina Isabel II durante una visita a Los Angeles.

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: El Infierno
programme.desc: Benny es deportado de Estados Unidos a un México desgarrado por la guerra entre cárteles del narcotráfico. Se involucra en el negocio narco y asciende rápidamente, rodeado de dinero, mujeres, violencia y excesos.

programme.title: Pídeme lo que quieras
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de su padre, Eric Zimmerman viaja a España para supervisar las sucursales de su empresa. En Madrid, se enamora de Judith y entabla una relación erótica llena de exploración. Eric teme que su secreto acabe con su aventura.

programme.title: La isla mínima
programme.desc: Se producen una serie de crímenes brutales contra chicas adolescentes en un paraje remoto del sur de España. Dos detectives, con personalidades contrapuestas, son designados para investigar.

programme.title: Amor a primera visa
programme.desc: Alejandro, un mariachi, y su mejor amigo, Canicas, aprovechan un encuentro casual como una oportunidad para hacer cambiar de opinión a la joven de la embajada, Rachel, que rechazó la solicitud de visa de su hija para visitar EE. UU.

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: No manches Frida 2
programme.desc: El exconvicto reformado, Zequi (Omar Chaparro), enfrenta una crisis cuando su boda con Lucy (Martha Higareda) se cancela. Mientras intenta recuperar su amor, debe liderar a su escuela en un torneo crucial contra el exnovio perfecto de Lucy. ¡Caos total!

programme.title: Cementerio maldito
programme.desc: Basada en la aterradora novela de Stephen King. Después de que la familia Creed se muda a la zona rural de Maine, se topan con un antiguo cementerio con poderes siniestros.

programme.title: Terror al anochecer
programme.desc: En 1946, el pueblo de Texarkana sufrió una serie de experiencias traumáticas que todavía recuerda hoy, treinta años más tarde, entre marzo y mayo, cinco personas fueron asesinadas a manos de un loco enmascarado.

programme.title: Las ruinas
programme.desc: "The Ruins" sigue a un grupo de amigos que se ven atrapados en una lucha brutal de supervivencia después de visitar una remota excavación arqueológica en la selva mexicana donde descubren un ser mortal entre las ruinas.

programme.title: El lobo de snow hollow
programme.desc: El sheriff de un pueblo pequeño y su apático equipo de oficiales deben resolver una serie de asesinatos que ocurren en la luna llena. Mientras es consumido por la búsqueda del asesino, lucha por recordarse a sí mismo que los hombres lobo no existen...

programme.title: 666: El niño Diablo
programme.desc: Un avión de pasajeros se precipita desde el cielo hasta la Tierra. De las brasas ardientes se levanta un sobreviviente solitario: un niño pequeño. La pareja sin hijos que lo adopte pronto descubrirá que no es un niño indefenso sino algo muy poderoso.

programme.title: Habitación Ouija
programme.desc: Una mujer agorafóbica comienza a convocar espíritus para que sean sus amigos mientras su hermano / cuidador no está durante el día, pero cuanto más tiempo pasa con los espíritus, más claro se vuelve que no son tan amigables después de todo.

programme.title: Los usurpadores de cuerpos
programme.desc: Bajo el amparo de las tinieblas, una ciudad duerme sin sospechar que una forma de vida alienígena está formándose para desatar un terror indescriptible, en uno de los grandes thrillers de suspenso clásicos del cine.

programme.title: Las ruinas
programme.desc: "The Ruins" sigue a un grupo de amigos que se ven atrapados en una lucha brutal de supervivencia después de visitar una remota excavación arqueológica en la selva mexicana donde descubren un ser mortal entre las ruinas.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: Vera Cruz
programme.desc: In this epic Western, two shady mercenaries (Gary Cooper, Burt Lancaster) in Mexico during the 1866 revolution are hired to escort a Countess and her gold to the Mexican army in Vera Cruz and find themselves at odds with the army…and each other!

programme.title: Back In The Saddle
programme.desc: When pollution poisons hundreds of cattle, Gene Autry, faces trouble from all sides. Originally released in 1941, this film features Gene's signature song and his lovable sidekick, Smiley Burnette.

programme.title: Sunset in Wyoming
programme.desc: Conscientious rancher Gene Autry must save his valley from flooding caused by a lumber company that is stripping the land. Gene hatches a plan to declare the mountain a state park and wildlife shrine.

programme.title: Canadian Pacific
programme.desc: A surveyor for the Canadian Pacific Railroad must fight fur trappers who oppose the building of the railroad by stirring up Indian rebellion.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: Texas Rangers and long-time ranching partners Gus McCrae and Woodrow Call meet their old friend Jake, and decide to strike out from their south Texas base and drive a cattle herd to Montana.

programme.title: The Ten Commandments (1956)
programme.desc: Raised as an Egyptian prince, Moses (Charlton Heston) discovers his Hebrew heritage, hears God's call, and engages in a bitter battle with the Pharaoh Ramses (Yul Brynner) to free the Jews from slavery, leading them to the Promised Land.

programme.title: Samson and Delilah
programme.desc: The glorious epic style of Cecil B. DeMille is exemplified in this story of the Bible's legendary strongman and the woman who seduces, then betrays him.

programme.title: Beauty And The Beast (1946)
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman takes her father's place as the prisoner of a mysterious beast, who wishes to marry her.

programme.title: My Friend Irma
programme.desc: A slapsticky saga related by a comparatively bright brunette dishing the dirt about her dumb blonde roommate. Dean Martin and Jerry Lewis's movie debut.

programme.title: Living It Up
programme.desc: fter being mistakenly diagnosed with a terminal illness, Homer Flagg and his doctor accept an all-expenses-paid trip to Manhattan—choosing to go along with the misunderstanding.

programme.title: The Stooge
programme.desc: Money isn't everything and Bill Miller proves it. He's carved out a modest niche as a singer in the off-vaudeville circuit. But suddenly his act is big news.

programme.title: Hollywood Or Bust
programme.desc: A movie-mad nitwit driving across the country to his mecca, Hollywood, is joined by a gambler who wants to break into singing when they pick up a pretty girl en route. Once in Hollywood the nitwit meets his dream goddess.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When a blue feather arrives in the mail for Lisa, her Hungarian roots tell her that trouble is brewing. The feather is a symbol of malfortune to come, and she suspects it was sent by Hungarian gypsies, a warning that they are out to get her.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Don't count chickens before they hatch! Oliver thinks he's laid a gold egg of an idea when he decides to dive beak first into the business of raising chickens. Lisa, on the other hand, sees little difference between raising chickens and children.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: All that glitters is not frosted cereal. After a jewelry heist in Chicago, the robbers foolishly stash their booty in the grain bin of a cereal manufacturer. Oliver and Lisa discover the jewels in their bowl of Crickly Wickly!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver Wendell Douglas returns from farm to firm... law firm, that is. When a young and ambitious local graduates from law school, he looks for a potential partner in Hooterville. Oliver is the logical choice. Lisa and Eb help the new venture.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After partnering with a young, local lawyer, Oliver has opened a new law office in Hooterville. However, their secretary, Lisa, shows a lack of necessary skills. Soon, Lisa's job is on the line, even if she is married to one of the partners.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When the Young Peoples Agricultural Society holds their annual convention in Washington, D.C., local members Eb, Mr. Kimball, and Arnold the pig get ready to make the big trip. Oliver and Lisa serve as unintended chaperones.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: While Lisa and Oliver consider what to do on their unplanned trip to Washington D.C., Mr. Haney rents their house to a family of eight. Meanwhile in the nation's capital, Lisa and Eb tour the White House, and Mr. Kimball makes official trouble.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Jim's old girlfriend shows up hoping to rekindle their romance, Alex quickly sets out to win her heart away from her former suitor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: On the eve of the biggest fight of his career, Tony loses interest in boxing when his girlfriend announces she may be expecting his baby.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie is worried his blind girlfriend will no longer love him if an operation to restore her sight is successful.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: To what lengths will boyfriend Arnie go to win over Elaine's kids? Elaine is in for a surprise when she invites him over to meet her children.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies come to the rescue when Jim tries to convince his family that he didn't squander his inheritance by buying a run-down restaurant.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Latka worries that Simka's wacky behavior might cost her the right to remain permanently in America.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies embark on a frantic race against time when they team up in a wild nonstop drive from New York to Miami so that Alex can see his long-lost daughter on her twenty-minute layover at the airport in the premiere episode of Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex’s romantic instincts are triggered by the sexy voice at the answering service. Her alluring manner prompts him to arrange a dinner date that turns into a big surprise on Taxi.

programme.desc: Bub wins the Irish Hospitals' Sweepstakes and takes the whole Douglas family to Ireland.

programme.desc: Steve forgets his plans with the Cub Scouts.

programme.desc: Steve escorts a visiting congresswoman.

programme.desc: The school bully teaches Chip to steal lunches.

programme.title: My Three Sons

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When a charmingly sweet doe wanders onto the Douglas farm, an enchanted Lisa befriends the beautiful animal. Having had her heart won over, Lisa resolves to have all deer hunting banned in Hooterville, winning support however necessary.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Farmhand Eb plans to take his girlfriend to a fancy restaurant for her birthday. Only problem is he can't afford it. Oliver encourages Eb to get creative and figure out how to earn the money himself. And if Eb is anything, it's creative.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: District Attorney Gerard Darnelle is tough on criminals and has made many enemies throughout his long career. When his daughter is kidnapped, the FBI arrives, but Gillespie and Tibbs sidestep them and follow their own leads to bring her home safely.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When Lonnie Jamison helps Francie Miller, an old high school crush who’s in deep trouble and hitting the bottle, he finds a connection between Francie’s low-life boyfriend, Nick Crews, and a recent armed robbery of a local Sparta supermarket.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A greedy slumlord in the Bottoms, Keen Philbrick, is notorious for the cruel and unfair treatment of his tenants, and his ownership of two drug dens. When he’s found murdered, Gillespie will need the help of savvy Bottoms informant, Jimmy Dawes.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman hires Barnaby to look into the death of her father who was apparently killed by a computer programmed machine in his own plant. It isn't too long before Barnaby suspects foul play rather computer malfunction.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: The parents of an up-and-coming songwriter ask Barnaby for help in uncovering the truth after he dies of a heroin overdose.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Betty urges Barnaby to look into the death of an old girlfriend, and they soon discover that another old girlfriend of Betty's is directly involved in her death.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby is hired by a South American President to find his son who lives in LA. He finds him but learns he is also the Rebel leader, Javier he is presently at odds with.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A young widow hires Barnaby to investigate the "accidental" death of her husband of only four weeks.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Two very different victims are murdered: one a very rich foreign businessman found knifed; the other a poor black police informant found shot in a phone booth. Meanwhile, a Japanese industrialist is also found dead.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A gang of hijackers steals more than they bargained for. The gold they have stolen is mixed with deadly uranium.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Mike and Steve face the ugly task of discovering who has become a syndicate informer.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A trio of violent prison escapees leaves a trail of blood by murdering or crippling everyone they see.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Kidnapping and murder are linked to a boy stealing medicine for his ailing sister.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Five-O goes into action when a Honolulu racket boss, Tokura, runs into serious difficulty with a secret Japanese society. McGarrett finds he must protect Tokura even though he is trying to convict the racket king for his underworld activities.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Still groggy from a visit to the dentist, Dr. Sloan is mystified when a noted fund-raiser dies while visiting his home. Adding to the confusion, the body mysteriously disappears before the police get there!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's free tickets to a friend's magic show become an invitation to murder when the magician mysteriously dies on stage in the middle of his escape act!

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble stumbles into the intrigues of a politically ambitious man when he rescues a leading citizen and his woman companion from a plane crash.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Neuropsychiatrist Mark Ryder employs a computer and Lt. Gerard's help to plan Richard Kimble's capture.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble finds an escaped prisoner who is dangerously ill claiming to be innocent and determined to gun down the man he blames for framing him.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A romance in bloom is nipped in the bud when Steve's new girlfriend is charged with murder. An instructor of modern dance, Cindy is shocked to learn she's being charged with killing one of the owners of the studio where she works.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A cruel collage prank comes back to haunt four young women in later life. Although Amanda had almost forgotten it, a recent letter brings back the unpleasant memory.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Surprise, surprise! While investigating the murder of a call-girl, Dr. Sloan is caught in the middle of a vice raid!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A new designer drug is on the market and highly-priced for rich teenagers. When teens start dying after taking the Silk drug, the rangers must find the source and stop its spread.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A man contacts Alex about a problem but is killed before giving details. His last words are to save the horses. The rangers investigate the man's last days and find a plot to kill the wild mustangs on a range to make way for a development.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: After a woman's car is forced off the road by a hit-and-run, Walker makes a daring rescue of her and her daughter. He is injured and falls into a coma in the hospital. Trivette and others search for the driver of the hit-and-run car.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: An elderly Indian Chief dies. He learns that Chief Six Feathers was killed because he would not sign over his land for development. The chief's relative gets into trouble investigating the death. Walker and Trivette help.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker, Trivette, and CD take a vacation together. While there to fish, some men think they are there to find his drug operation. This places the rangers in danger as they are hunted down.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Fran comes up with a way Vint and Naomi can have a dinner party. Mama is against it until Naomi says anything they could have at Mama's would be second-rate.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama desperately wants to go to the mall and pick up a hat she really wants, but no one can drive her. The family attempts to teach Mama to drive which is unsuccessful until Mama realizes she may lose out on her hat.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Naomi returns from her self-defense class and shows the family what she learned. Fran and Sonja are impressed with what Naomi does and says and decide to join. After Mama is mugged, she decides to join as well.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Mama decides to buy her own car from Vint's childhood friend, Willie Potts, she is dismayed that the car is a lemon and demands her money back.

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Vint takes Naomi to a romantic motel to celebrate their one-year anniversary, and Mama tags along to assist Aunt Effie, who fell. When Mama leaves Aunt Effie after a fight, she is forced to spend the night with Vint and Naomi.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Ellen talks Mama into holding Mayor Tutwiller's reelection campaign at her house, but when Mama ridicules the Mayor, he challenges her to run herself, much to Ellen's chagrin.

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.title: My Three Sons

programme.desc: Robbie falls in love and plans to get married after college. But when they have to babysit a friend's child on short notice, they realize that they are far too young to be married.

programme.desc: When a female student joins the boys' track team and proves that she's faster than anyone, Chip decides to join the girls' field hockey team in protest.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Chip and his friend annoy Robbie and his date, who turns out to be the older sister of Chip's friend. Robbie decides to get back at Chip on his next date.

programme.title: My Three Sons

programme.title: My Three Sons

programme.desc: Peter and Bobby believe they are seeing a UFO, which actually is part of an elaborate hoax being played by Greg. The trick backfires though when Peter and Bobby take pictures, which lead to a government investigation.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A quarter of a century after the murders of two nurses, Canadian police suspect that a former Toronto cop committed the crimes. A blow to the head of a garbage collector in San Jose leaves strange markings.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police must wait nearly 30 years before advances in DNA technology give them the chance to convict the killer of a young hitchhiker, and Philadelphia police wage a 16-year hunt for the man who raped and killed a 10-year-old girl.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In December 1985, when human bones are discovered in the woods, it puts an end to the search for missing teen David Reed. David's skull fractures point to murder; but it will be decades before investigators can find his killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: The loving aunt of a close-knit family is stabbed to death in her home. It takes two decades for detectives to discover that a key witness was an imposter--and caused the case to go cold.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: A family is torn apart by their grandparents' murders. Two decades later, a cold case detective takes on the case that has haunted him since he was a child--racing to solve it before the family takes matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: After 46 years, LA homicide detectives take a Lover's Lane bandit who also gunned down two police officers into custody. Then, DNA testing helps lead police in Florida to a suspected killer, however, the killer has an identical twin.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: The brutal stabbing murder of a Florida woman is solved when police find crucial DNA evidence in spit left on the pavement. And a man is put away for rape and murder when his footprint matches the footprint he left at the crime scene 18 years before.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A killer helps convict himself when he boasts about his crime to prison cellmates; and New Hampshire investigators probing the murder of a pregnant woman found raped, strangled, and dumped into her bathtub, get a new lead.

programme.title: Cold Case Files

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Condena por Huella de Palma de Mano
programme.desc: Una investigación sobre un asesinato se ve favorecida por un requisito legal de que los bares tengan cámaras de video instaladas en las instalaciones. Video, cabello y sangre conducen al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1969, la operadora telefónica de 25 años, Diane Maxwell, es violada y asesinada. Su hermano prometió que averiguaría quién fue el responsable y llevaría al asesino ante la justicia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Es musgo, no grama
programme.desc: Una joven fue encontrada muerta en un campo de golf en las Bahamas. El césped de ese campo era tan distintivo que tenía valor probatorio. La evidencia llevó a la policía a dos sospechosos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación del secuestro de la esposa de un prominente banquero llevó a la policía a una persecución inútil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Wanda Mason, empleada de una tienda, los investigadores descubren que la cámara de seguridad de la tienda ha captado todo el asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pelo de perro
programme.desc: Sin evidencia forense dentro de la escena del crimen, los investigadores estaban desconcertados. Pero sospecharon que el perro de la víctima había sido testigo del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un rastro de un asesinato se esfuma, hasta que la policía recibe un llamado de una mujer cuyo esposo, Gerald Powers, tenía un pasado criminal y una afición por los Chevy Berettas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se denuncia la desaparición de una mujer tras una pelea con su marido. La policía sospecha de un hombre que denunció un incendio en su automóvil. En el interior se encuentran dos diminutas gotas de sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una investigación sobre un asesinato se ve favorecida por un requisito legal de que los bares tengan cámaras de video instaladas en las instalaciones. Video, cabello y sangre conducen al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas de elefante
programme.desc: Los asesinatos de una pareja de ancianos dejan a la policía perpleja hasta que, dos años después, reciben un gran alivio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, Denise O'Neill, una mesera de Palm Beach, es secuestrada y asesinada. Su vecino, Luis Caballero, levanta sospechas por su comportamiento extraño hacia los equipos de TV que cubren el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuando se calma el agua
programme.desc: Un dirigente sindical es ejecutado en su casa poco después de una huelga de los miembros del sindicato. Ni su esposa ni nadie en el vecindario escuchó ningún disparo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, se descubrieron un cráneo humano y algunos huesos en un campamento de niños exploradores cerca de Farmington, Missouri. La reconstrucción facial ayuda a los investigadores en este caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía de Virginia Beach llegó al departamento de Makdessi para encontrar los cuerpos ensangrentados de Elise Makdessi y de Quincy Brown, un soldado de la Marina. ¿Pero era el amante de Elise o su agresor?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando la policía encuentra el cuerpo de Krista Harrison, de 11 años, hay pocas pistas sobre la identidad del asesino. Pero las autoridades están intrigadas por las inusuales fibras naranjas incrustadas en la ropa que se encuentran cerca de la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una bailarina de gogó le dijo a su familia que necesitaba alejarse por un tiempo, y luego simplemente desapareció. Los investigadores sospecharon, porque ella no se llevó ni su auto ni su ropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mujer estaba muerta. Al hombre le habían disparado cuatro veces pero sobrevivió.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una hermosa joven cayó a su muerte desde un acantilado con vistas al océano. Inicialmente, los investigadores pensaron que se trataba de un trágico accidente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2000, cuando la adolescente Tara Munsey desapareció al salir de su trabajo en un restaurante de Virginia, no se sabe si se escapó o si fue víctima de un juego sucio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke tells the story of Ancient Egyptian art and how it reflected the civilisation's religion, through thirty extraordinary masterpieces.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke explores the sumptuous treasures of the Golden Age of Egyptian art, starting with troubling psychological portraits of tyrant king Senwosret III, and ending with the golden mask of boy-king Tutankhamun.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: From the statues of Rameses II to the final flourishes under Queen Cleopatra, Sooke discovers that the subsequent invasions by foreign rulers, from the Nubians and Alexander the Great to the Romans, produced a new hybrid art full of surprise.

programme.title: Secrets of the Pyramids
programme.desc: Exploring fresh archaeological excavations that shed new light on the lives of those who worked tirelessly on the pyramids.

programme.title: Animal Mummies
programme.desc: Exploring the world of pet preservation.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan meets the mummies of Tutankhamun's parents at the Egyptian Museum in Cairo, and discovers that they were actually brother and sister. CT scans reveal how this incestuous relationship could have been responsible for Tutankhamun's poor health.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Picking up the story in 1323BC, the pharaoh sustains the injury that would eventually kill him. Dan investigates a scan of Tutankhamun's skeleton, while John visits Howard Carter's house and probes the 1920s craze of 'Tutmania'.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan discovers a series of anomalies in Tutankhamun's burial, and spots that the faces on his coffins and canopic jars do not match that of the famous golden mask. Raksha looks at Seti's tomb, which shows how hurried Tutankhamun's was in comparison.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: In the Lambayeque valley in northern Peru lies a strange lost world, the forgotten ruins of 250 mysterious pyramids, including some of the biggest on the planet, colossal structures made out of mud bricks.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest vanishing acts in history. More than 3,000 years ago a mysterious and ruthless civilisation rose from nothing, created a brutal and unstoppable army and built an empire that rivalled Egypt and Babylon.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A pit bull is aggressive toward people and dogs; a dachshund mix exhibits aggression at feeding time and when it comes time to trim his nails.
